inputs.symptoms: Faces are flickering randomly between light and dark patches that form no pattern.

inputs.observer_message: Faces are flickering randomly between light and dark patches that form no pattern.
inputs.stellar_action_text: Sound a sustained moderate tone near all six faces simultaneously for 10 seconds, starting from the top face. Let the tone fade naturally and wait for the hum to stabilize.

inputs.symptoms: The light on each face keeps sliding slowly across the surface like colors drifting.

inputs.observer_message: The light on each face keeps sliding slowly across the surface like colors drifting.
inputs.stellar_action_text: Chime a bell near two opposite faces, starting from the top face. Alternate the chime between the two faces — 10 seconds pause between chimes — for five cycles at moderate tone.

inputs.symptoms: The hum has a layered quality, like multiple tones stacked on top of each other.

inputs.observer_message: The hum has a layered quality, like multiple tones stacked on top of each other.
inputs.stellar_action_text: Drape a cloth over two adjacent edges near the top face for 10 seconds at moderate coverage. Then chime a bell three times near the top face.

inputs.symptoms: The corners are noticeably dimmer than the rest, almost dark.

inputs.observer_message: The corners are noticeably dimmer than the rest, almost dark.
inputs.stellar_action_text: Warm each corner of the top face by holding a heated stone nearby for 10 seconds at moderate warmth, in sequence. Then trace each edge of the top face with a finger.

inputs.symptoms: It is dim overall, all faces are faint.

inputs.observer_message: It is dim overall, all faces are faint.
inputs.stellar_action_text: Place a warm stone beside the top face at moderate warmth for 10 seconds. Rotate and repeat for each face.

inputs.symptoms: All faces are blazing with painfully bright white light.

inputs.observer_message: All faces are blazing with painfully bright white light.
inputs.stellar_action_text: Drape a cool cloth over the Veyru for 10 seconds. Remove the cloth and fan moderate cool air across the top face and the opposite face for 10 seconds.

inputs.symptoms: Opposite faces alternate between bright and dark in a strict pulsing rhythm.

inputs.observer_message: Opposite faces alternate between bright and dark in a strict pulsing rhythm.
inputs.stellar_action_text: Illuminate the top face with a dim lamp and the opposite face with a bright lamp simultaneously at moderate brightness for 10 seconds, without moving the lamps.

inputs.symptoms: One face is dramatically brighter than the others with intense localized vibration.

inputs.observer_message: One face is dramatically brighter than the others with intense localized vibration.
inputs.stellar_action_text: Drape a folded cloth over the top face for 10 seconds at moderate coverage. Then chime a bell near each edge of the top face twice.

inputs.symptoms: One or two corners glow intensely bright while the rest looks normal.

inputs.observer_message: One or two corners glow intensely bright while the rest looks normal.
inputs.stellar_action_text: At each corner of the top face, chime a bell briefly at moderate tone, then warm the two edges meeting at that corner with a heated stone for 10 seconds.

inputs.symptoms: Edges appear to wobble or flex when touched.

inputs.observer_message: Edges appear to wobble or flex when touched.
inputs.stellar_action_text: Rest a flat board against the top face at moderate contact for 10 seconds. Rotate and repeat for each face-pair.

inputs.symptoms: Light patterns have frozen completely — dim, not bright, and totally still.

inputs.observer_message: Light patterns have frozen completely — dim, not bright, and totally still.
inputs.stellar_action_text: Chime a bell near the center of each face once at moderate tone, starting from the top face. Then place a warm stone beside the Veyru for 10 seconds.

inputs.symptoms: The hum has split into two or more competing tones that clash.

inputs.observer_message: The hum has split into two or more competing tones that clash.
inputs.stellar_action_text: Place the Veyru on a soft surface with the top face up at moderate contact. Let it rest undisturbed for 10 seconds.

inputs.symptoms: Surfaces feel rough or gritty, and the light has a reddish tint.

inputs.observer_message: Surfaces feel rough or gritty, and the light has a reddish tint.
inputs.stellar_action_text: Drape a cool cloth over the Veyru for 10 seconds. Remove and fan moderate cool air across all six faces for 10 seconds, starting from the top face.

inputs.symptoms: Faces glow normally at the surface but it sounds hollow when tapped.

inputs.observer_message: Faces glow normally at the surface but it sounds hollow when tapped.
inputs.stellar_action_text: Rotate the Veyru slowly over 10 seconds while sounding a steady tone at moderate volume near opposite faces, starting from the top face. After rotation, chime a bell once near each corner.
